outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Israel says it will begin direct negotiations with Lebanon as US prepares for Iran ceasefire talks
outlets.summary: CNN tracks multiple fronts: IDF kills Hezbollah chief's secretary, ~70 rockets from Lebanon, Netanyahu orders Lebanon talks, oil rebounds above $98.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire shows cracks as Israel pounds Lebanon
outlets.summary: Trump warns "shootin starts" if Iran doesn't comply. NATO friction at Rutte meeting. Ceasefire durability in serious doubt.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump's Iran ceasefire strains as Gulf states report drone attacks
outlets.summary: Saudi intercepts 9 drones, UAE 17 missiles and 35 drones, Kuwait 28 drone attacks. Ceasefire fraying rapidly.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: How Trump used the Iran ceasefire to avoid a war he never planned
outlets.summary: Analysis suggests Trump was never planning full Iran obliteration — ceasefire was the endgame strategy.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Israel to hold ceasefire talks with Lebanon
outlets.summary: Comprehensive liveblog covering Harshi killing, 70 rockets, Lebanon negotiations, Hormuz Chinese tankers, Qalibaf violations.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Vance to Lead Iran Talks as Tehran Says Ceasefire Violated
outlets.summary: Vance, Witkoff, Kushner heading to Pakistan for Islamabad talks. China tankers testing Hormuz. Oil above $100.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF says it killed Hezbollah chief's secretary as some 70 rockets fired from Lebanon
outlets.summary: Ali Yusuf Harshi killed in Tallet Khayat, Beirut. 70 rockets from Hezbollah. Netanyahu orders Lebanon talks.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF Strikes Across Lebanon, Warns of Escalating Hezbollah Fire
outlets.summary: Hezbollah claims rockets fired in response to Israeli ceasefire violations. IDF expanding buffer zone in south Lebanon.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: President Pezeshkian: Iranians will continue to stand together after ceasefire
outlets.summary: Pezeshkian calls ceasefire result of martyred Khamenei's blood. Says Lebanon ceasefire essential condition. Condemns Israeli strikes.

outlets.name: IRNA / State TV
outlets.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei vows revenge and 'new phase' for Hormuz
outlets.summary: New Supreme Leader pledges revenge for father, warns Gulf neighbors, signals permanent Hormuz changes.
